title: Whale Trade Alerts
description: Get Telegram alerts when top Polymarket traders make moves
prompt:
I want to set up whale tracking alerts for Polymarket. Install the n8n-nodes-polymarket-tools community node in my n8n instance (Settings > Community Nodes). Then import the Smart Money Radar template from https://github.com/polymarket-tools/polymarket-tools/blob/main/packages/n8n-nodes/templates/smart-money-radar.json. Configure it to:
- Poll the leaderboard every 10 minutes
- Track the top 5 traders
- Send alerts to my Telegram bot
Help me set up the Telegram bot credential and activate the workflow.

title: Copy Trading Bot
description: Mirror trades from top Polymarket wallets automatically
prompt:
I want to copy trade top Polymarket traders. Install the n8n-nodes-polymarket-tools community node in my n8n instance (Settings > Community Nodes). Then import the Copy Trader template from https://github.com/polymarket-tools/polymarket-tools/blob/main/packages/n8n-nodes/templates/copy-trader.json. Configure it to:
- Monitor the top trader from the weekly leaderboard
- Mirror their trades at 10% of their position size
- Start in validate-only mode (paper trading)
- Send trade alerts to Telegram
Help me set up both Telegram and Polymarket API credentials.

title: AI Market Analyst
description: AI agent that searches markets, analyzes prices, and suggests trades
prompt:
I want an AI agent that analyzes Polymarket prediction markets. Install the n8n-nodes-polymarket-tools community node in my n8n instance (Settings > Community Nodes). Then import the AI News-to-Market Matcher template from https://github.com/polymarket-tools/polymarket-tools/blob/main/packages/n8n-nodes/templates/news-to-market-matcher.json. Configure it to:
- Monitor Reuters RSS feed for breaking news
- Match news to open Polymarket markets
- Use OpenAI to analyze whether the news impacts the market price
- Send high-confidence signals to Telegram
Help me set up OpenAI and Telegram credentials.

title: Daily Portfolio Digest
description: Morning P&L summary of your Polymarket positions
prompt:
I want a daily summary of my Polymarket portfolio. Install the n8n-nodes-polymarket-tools community node in my n8n instance (Settings > Community Nodes). Then import the Portfolio Sheets Sync template from https://github.com/polymarket-tools/polymarket-tools/blob/main/packages/n8n-nodes/templates/portfolio-sheets-sync.json. Configure it to:
- Pull my wallet positions every morning at 9am
- Calculate total value and P&L per position
- Export to Google Sheets
My Polymarket wallet address is [PASTE YOUR WALLET ADDRESS]. Help me set up Google Sheets credentials.

title: Sports Edge Scanner
description: Compare Polymarket odds against sportsbook lines for edge detection
prompt:
I want to find edges between Polymarket and sportsbook odds. Install the n8n-nodes-polymarket-tools community node in my n8n instance (Settings > Community Nodes). Then import the Sportsbook Edge Scanner template from https://github.com/polymarket-tools/polymarket-tools/blob/main/packages/n8n-nodes/templates/sportsbook-edge-scanner.json. Configure it to:
- Search Polymarket for NBA markets every 15 minutes
- Compare against sportsbook odds from The Odds API
- Alert on Telegram when an edge exceeds 5%
Help me get a free API key from The Odds API and set up the Telegram credential.
